description: An Information Security Analyst is rolling out a new asset tracking policy. A policy document has been placed on the desktop at ~/Desktop/asset_tagging_policy.txt. Review the policy, create the required Custom Fields in OpManager, tag the localhost device (127.0.0.1) with the appropriate compliance metadata, and create a dynamic group named 'PCI-In-Scope-Assets' that automatically includes devices matching the specified compliance framework. Application: http://localhost:8060 (admin/Admin@123).
